summary: Kang Hyunwoo arrives at the Intermediate Academy of the Luos Empire to begin his test, which simulates a large-scale battlefield scenario. Despite his lack of experience with horses and being initially overwhelmed by the enemy, he effectively commands his troops and uses his skills to turn the tide of the battle. After successfully leading his side to victory, he is awarded the 'Ruler of the Battlefield' title and prepares to face a formidable opponent based on the memories of the Emperor in the next stage.
key_moments: Kang Hyunwoo enters the Senu Intermediate Academy and begins his first battlefield command test.
Hyunwoo utilizes Tengi to protect the soldiers and uses his leadership to inspire the troops to charge against the enemy.
Hyunwoo clears the first stage, gains experience and skill proficiencies, and earns the 'Ruler of the Battlefield' title.
The second stage begins, revealing that Hyunwoo must face an opponent recreated from the memories of the Emperor.
